slots.name: statement
slots.copy: Helping millions of organizations grow better.

slots.name: support
slots.copy: Growing better means aligning your company's success with your customers' — winning with empathy, at scale.

asset.alt: HubSpot team collaborating in a bright open workplace

rationale: The brief is a statement beat, not a conversion beat, so the hero adopts the hero-mission-monument genre archetype: a dead-centered mission statement at the display tier, one supporting conviction line, and a framed company photograph seated BELOW the type like an altarpiece base — media strictly subordinate. Adapted (not reused) from the project seeds because none of them (photo-overlay conversion hero, dark closing CTA, tabbed testimonial) fits a mission-first about opener; seededFrom is null. The single quiet 'Read our story' action is a typographic cta link, honoring 'at most one quiet action'. Photography supports but never carries text: the image sits in its own framed slot beneath the copy, so no-text-on-photos holds by construction and no text-on-media treatment is emitted. Surface is 'raised' (warm cream) — a light, optimistic editorial canvas obeying the light-canvas invariant, no dark mid-page band, and a variety pick less used across the run. Headings resolve to the brand's sentence-case serif conviction tier at weight <= 500, and the centered anchor keeps the framed media symmetric (no offset), so media-registration stays clean.
